notification.airdrop_supply.airdrop_arri:
§c❄ §3Winter Radio §c❄ 
§7Aid airdrop is about to be deployed.
§7Survivors, please head to the coordinates within 1 day:
§7x= %1$s §7y= %2$s §7z= %3$s
notification.airdrop_supply.airdrop_cras:
§c❄ §3Winter Radio §c❄ 
§7For unknown reasons, %1$s's airdrop supply crate was lost in transit.
notification.airdrop_supply.airdrop_inva:
§c❄ §3Winter Radio §c❄
§7The airdrop dispatched to §a%4$s§7 by PDC
§7has been scavenged by other survivors due to excessive delay!
notification.airdrop_supply.airdrop_summ:
§c❄ §3Winter Radio §c❄
§7%1$s has called for an airdrop supply crate. Please stand by.
§7%1$s tried to summon an airdrop in an invalid dimension.
notification.airdrop_supply.airdrop_loca:
§7%3$s fixed the airdrop location at
§7 x= %1$s §7z= %2$s
§7%1$s tried to set a fixed airdrop location in an invalid dimension.
§7Cannot cancel the fixed airdrop location in this dimension.
notification.airdrop_supply.map_point: §eThe airdrop location has been marked on your minimap.
command.airdrop_supply.error_dimension: §cUnable to create an airdrop in this dimension.
